hero:
# Audio Similarity Recommender

**Audio-feature similarity & artist clustering · Python · Scikit-learn · BeautifulSoup**

## Hero Overview

A clustering/similarity proof of concept: a pipeline transforming semi-structured artist data into clean datasets for 20K+ artists, extracting MFCC audio features and projecting them with PCA, t-SNE and UMAP to surface artist-similarity clusters.

A separate GTZAN genre classifier (Support Vector Classifier, ~74% accuracy / 0.97 AUC) serves as a benchmark validating the MFCC feature space behind the similarity work.

points.evidence: Built a weekly ingestion pipeline transforming semi-structured NoSQL artist data into clean Pandas datasets for 20K+ artists.
Automated WAV retrieval/preprocessing, extracting 20 MFCCs per track and standardizing inputs for downstream work.
Applied PCA, t-SNE and UMAP across MFCC space, preserving audio-pattern structure to surface artist-similarity clusters and visualizations.
Trained an SVC genre classifier on GTZAN MFCC features reaching ~74% accuracy and 0.97 AUC as a benchmark validating the MFCC feature space.

network_graph.title: Technology Capability Network
network_graph.description: Maps the project's core techniques to the tools used to implement them.

storyline:
# Storyline

## Context

Music discovery benefits from similarity grounded in actual audio characteristics, not just metadata tags.

## Workflow

Weekly artist-data ingestion → audio feature extraction → manifold projection → artist-similarity clustering, with a GTZAN genre classifier as a benchmark.

## Technical Implementation

- **Ingestion:** BeautifulSoup/Regex pipeline transforming NoSQL artist data into Pandas frames for 20K+ artists.
- **Features:** WAV preprocessing extracting 20 MFCCs per track with standardized inputs.
- **Projection:** PCA, t-SNE and UMAP across MFCC space for structure-preserving artist-similarity clustering and visualization.
- **Benchmark classifier:** SVC on GTZAN MFCC features (~74% accuracy, 0.97 AUC) validating the feature space.

## Outcomes

Produced an audio-feature similarity proof of concept — artist-similarity clusters over an MFCC feature space, with a genre classifier as a supporting benchmark.
